name: Ono Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off and discard the small tip of each wing.
2. Cut main wing at joint.
3. In a bowl, combine soy sauce, pineapple juice, garlic, onion, ginger, brown sugar, beer, and vegetable oil until all ingredients are dissolved.
4. Pour the marinade over the chicken wings and marinate overnight, ensuring that the sauce covers all pieces.
5. Drain the chicken wings and reserve the marinade.
6. In a large skillet, heat a small amount of oil over medium heat.
7. Brown the chicken on all sides. Once browned, add half of the reserved marinade and cover the pan.
8. Reduce the heat and simmer for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add more marinade if necessary.
9. Remove from heat and serve with toasted sesame seeds.
